projectDescription: Advanced astronomical visualization and terrain analysis engine combining real topographic horizons with precision star rendering and light pollution modeling
keyFeatures: Real-time 360° topographic horizon calculation using Digital Elevation Models
Automatic light pollution analysis from DVNL satellite data to Bortle scale
High-precision celestial mechanics using Gaia star catalog and DE421 ephemerides
Interactive telescope simulator with adjustable FOV and scope modes
Earth curvature correction for distant terrain visibility
SQM (Sky Quality Meter) estimation with Gaussian convolution kernels
Multi-band depth rendering for atmospheric haze effects
PyQt5-based desktop interface with real-time sky rendering
publicApiSurface: terralab - Main GUI application entry point
terralab-dvnl-preprocess - Preprocess DVNL light pollution rasters
terralab-dvnl-convolve - Apply convolution kernels to DVNL data
terralab-predict-sqm - Predict Sky Quality Meter readings from satellite data
terralab-calibrate-sqm - Calibrate SQM models with ground truth data
TerraLab.terrain.engine.HorizonBaker - Generate horizon profiles via raycasting
